verses.3: Oh that I knew where I might find him!
verses.4: I would set my cause in order before him,
verses.5: I would know the words which he would answer me,
verses.6: Would he contend with me in the greatness of his power?
verses.7: There the upright might reason with him,
verses.8: “If I go east, he is not there.
verses.9: He works to the north, but I can’t see him.
verses.10: But he knows the way that I take.
verses.11: My foot has held fast to his steps.
verses.12: I haven’t gone back from the commandment of his lips.
verses.13: But he stands alone, and who can oppose him?
verses.14: For he performs that which is appointed for me.
verses.15: Therefore I am terrified at his presence.
verses.16: For God has made my heart faint.
verses.17: Because I was not cut off before the darkness,
